Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Understand the Users Request Input An event log with 3 cases showing a business process Activities RA VF AE RMI AD SC AC Observed Behavior Case 1 RA VF AE RMI VF AD SC AC Case 2 RA VF AE AD SC AC Case 3 RA VF AE RMI RMI VF AD SC AC Key Pattern The process starts with RA VF AE Then optionally theres a loop involving RMI and VF can happen 0 1 or multiple times After that it proceeds to AD SC AC in sequence

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Analyze the Event Log Extract Control Flow All cases start with RA Then VF Then AE After AE theres a branching looping behavior Case 2 goes straight to AD Case 1 does RMI then VF then AD Case 3 does RMI RMI VF then AD

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Propose loop structure X tau *(RMI VF) to allow skipping the loop and handle 0 iterations as in Case 2

Name: Validation - NE
Text: Check loop traces for *(RMI VF) yields RMI or RMI VF RMI etc does not perfectly match RMI VF or RMI RMI VF but close to the pattern

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Reconsider loop definition and alternatives like *(RMI tau) or other but stick to prompt capturing repetitions of requesting missing info and re validation so *(RMI VF) inside XOR with tau

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Construct overall structure sequence RA VF AE X tau *(RMI VF) AD SC AC nested binary as per prompt definition -> RA -> VF -> AE -> X tau *(RMI VF) -> AD -> SC AC

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Verify balances fitness precision simplicity captures main flow optional repeating loop for missing info and re validation eventual approval confirmation archival

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Use standard process mining pattern X tau loop for optional loop and binary nesting for sequence to comply with prompt operators
